title: lycoctonum quelpaertense
intro: Lycoctonum quelpaertense, also known as Korean angelica or Dongbaekjeong, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family native to the Korean Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Lycoctonum quelpaertense include reducing menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS, improving circulation, and boosting the immune system. Lycoctonum quelpaertense is often used in traditional Korean medicine and can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and dried extracts.
